query: mixed color temperature sodium vapor orange streetlight clashing fluorescent night urban
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: mixed color temp — sodium vapor orange vs blue twilight, clashing artificial light sources, desolate urban night

response.objective_caption: A person wearing a cowboy hat and jacket sits on a white wooden bench alongside a red brick building on a nighttime street. The bench rests on a concrete sidewalk next to two-story brick storefronts with illuminated windows. Vintage street lamps line the sidewalk, producing pronounced starburst light patterns that radiate across the dark road stretching into the distance.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A person wearing a cowboy hat and jacket sits on a white wooden bench alongside a red brick building on a nighttime street bathed in a sickly orange sodium-vapor glow. The bench rests on a concrete sidewalk next to two-story brick storefronts with illuminated windows. Vintage street lamps line the sidewalk, producing pronounced starburst light patterns that radiate across the dark road stretching into the distance, while the unhealthy amber tint shifts skin and surfaces toward an unsettling monochrome hue.
